summary: The job failed because a git operation could not access the remote repository URL, causing a command to exit with code 128 and the workflow to fail.
root_cause: Git was unable to access the remote URL 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/', causing a command to fail with exit code 128 and terminating the job.

evidence.reason: Shows git could not access the remote repository URL, indicating a network or access failure.

evidence.quote: Error: Command failed with exit code 128 (Unknown system error -128)
evidence.reason: Indicates the failing command returned exit code 128, which is commonly from git failures.
Confirms the workflow job terminated with an error as a result of the failing command.

evidence.quote: An error occurred while minifying. The result will not be minified.
evidence.reason: Shows a build step encountered an error (non-fatal for minification) earlier in the log; the primary blocker is the git access error that caused the job to fail.

suggested_fix: Check network connectivity and access from the runner to https://github.com/vercel/next.js/ (e.g., test git clone from the runner), verify any required credentials or tokens are available to the job, then re-run the workflow.
